compiled_state.title: Add plugin boundary rule to CLAUDE.md Never Do These section
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Add a two-part plugin boundary rule to CLAUDE.md Critical Rules > Never Do These section. The rule must:

1. Positive enumeration: dev-team artifacts (designs, findings, archive, tests) belong in docs/designs/, docs/findings/, docs/archive/, tests/ at project root
2. NEVER-statement: NEVER place dev-team artifacts (investigation findings, design docs, ADRs, test files) inside plugins/dso/

The NEVER-statement should appear BEFORE the positive enumeration (positional bias: agents weight earlier constraints more heavily).

Include at least one shipped artifact example (agents, skills, hooks) and one local-only example (docs/designs/, docs/findings/) per epic SC3.

Cross-story coordination: use identical terminology to the doc-writer agent Output Scope section (S4 story 50d5-ac2e) — same directory names, same NEVER phrasing. If S4 has already been implemented, match its terminology exactly. If not, use these canonical terms: docs/designs/, docs/findings/, docs/archive/, tests/.

### Files to modify
- CLAUDE.md (modify — add rule to Never Do These)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CLAUDE.md Never Do These section contains a plugin boundary rule
  Verify: grep -q 'plugin boundary\|Plugin boundary\|dev-team artifact' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/CLAUDE.md
- [ ] Rule has positive enumeration of permitted directories (docs/designs/, docs/findings/, docs/archive/, tests/)
  Verify: grep -A 10 'plugin boundary\|Plugin boundary\|dev-team artifact' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/CLAUDE.md | grep -q 'docs/designs/'
- [ ] Rule has NEVER-statement prohibiting plugins/dso/ for dev artifacts
  Verify: grep -A 10 'plugin boundary\|Plugin boundary\|dev-team artifact' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/CLAUDE.md | grep -qi 'never.*plugins/dso'
- [ ] Rule includes shipped artifact example and local-only example
  Verify: grep -A 15 'plugin boundary\|Plugin boundary\|dev-team artifact' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/CLAUDE.md | grep -q 'agents\|skills\|hooks'
- [ ] RED test test_claude_md_has_plugin_boundary_rule passes (GREEN)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-plugin-boundary-refs.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'test_claude_md_has_plugin_boundary_rule.*PASS'
